issue_summary: Make `withProperties()` non-abstract (with dummy impl) just for 2.11, for improved compatibility
code_before:
protected abstract BeanSerializerBase withProperties(BeanPropertyWriter[] properties,
            BeanPropertyWriter[] filteredProperties);
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Mutant factory used for creating a new instance with modified set
     * of properties
     * 
     * @since 2.11.1
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Mutant factory used for creating a new instance with modified set * of properties. *

* Note: in 2.11.x, need to keep non-abstract for slightly better compatibility * (XML module extends) * * @since 2.11.1 */
